caption:
✨ Step up to the desk, professor, and show me the notes... but mine aren't in the book. 😉 The first day back, everyone looked like we were back to normal. Except me. My black blazer draped over my hourglass frame hugging each curve perfectly, my skirt short, and my blouse unbuttoned just enough. A whispered rumor spread through the lecture hall like wildfire; the new math teacher was *that* teacher who moved the way a secret moves. I smirked, adjusted my collar, and leaned in closer. Her eyes locked onto mine—intelligent, sharp, and just as hungry as mine. Then came the moment: the power slide projector malfunction. Lights flared, and in seconds the only thing illuminating the room was the screen on my laptop. I tapped furiously. 'Just a minor glitch,' I whispered, voice dropped to a sultry bass. The room went silent. Even my best friend in the back sat up straight. When I stood up, the fabric of my skirt clung, the air thick with tension, and I winked. We both knew. Tomorrow night, same time, my apartment. 🔥 

#CurvesAndChalk #UniversitySecrets #ProfessorsWearBlack #SexyTeacherVibes #DeskDateNight #AcademicAffair #BustyProfessor
